description: Writ of agency, probably written in Acre during the first half of the eleventh century. A woman appoints Mevorakh b. Yeḥezqel to take care of her money and affairs in Ashqelon, which her husband Avraham b. Natan had deposited with his brothers Wahbān and Ṣedaqa and their mother Ḥulda, who are from ʿAkko. Witnesses: Yosef b. Yiṣhaq; Mevorakh b. ʿEli; Shemuel b. Seʿadʾel; Natan b. Hillel; Yakhin b. Mevorakh. Qiyyum signed by Yosef b. Shelomo; ʿAmram b. Nuʿmān; the ḥaver Yosef b. Elʿazar.
description_he: ייפוי כוח, כנראה מעכו, מחצית ראשונה של המאה ה-11. אישה ממנה את מבורך בן יחזקאל לטפל בכספה בעזקלון, שאותם הפקיד בעלה אברהם בן נתן אצל אחיו ואמם בעכו.
